Hong Kong is set for its strongest quarterly growth in nearly five years, the finance chief has said, citing a 17 per cent rise in visitor numbers and a 5.2 per cent increase in retail and catering spending.
Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po said in his Sunday blog that 602,000 visitors entered Ho

news.headline: Taiwan leader visits Eswatini despite China’s attempts to block trip
news.summary: President William Lai Ching-te says he met King Mswati III and signed trade agreements.

news.headline: Joel Embiid, 76ers knock out second-seeded Celtics in NBA Playoffs
news.summary: The 76ers eliminate one of the favourites to book a second-round series against the New York Knicks.

news.headline: Japan contains one of its biggest wildfires in decades after 11-day battle
news.summary:
<p>Wildfires that scorched forests in northern Japan, reportedly the second biggest in over 30 years, have been brought under control after 11 days, officials have said.</p>

news.headline: In Yemen, Starlink internet brings opportunities – for some
news.summary: Despite Houthi resistance and affordability challenges, Starlink fuels growth in Yemen's digital workforce.

news.headline: Teen F1 leader Antonelli takes Miami pole as race start time changed
news.summary: Threat of heavy rainstorm in Miami causes organisers to move up race start time to 17:00 GMT on Sunday.
